name: Alex Rivera
message: Hi, I came across your company and would love to explore a potential collaboration. We specialize in AI-powered enterprise solutions. Would you be open to a brief call next week?

comments: We're building AI agent workflows for enterprise clients and see strong alignment with your platform. Interested in a partnership discussion.

_meta.notes: CAPTCHA form — tests bot protection handling

subject: AI Consulting Partnership
yourMessage: I lead LSA Digital's AI practice and we help organizations implement agentic AI solutions. I'd like to discuss how we might collaborate on upcoming projects in your portfolio.
